title: BUG #18705: Segmentation fault when create brin index on user-defined type.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_sva(sva VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE FUNCTION normalize_si(sva VARCHAR(255)) RETURNS VARCHAR(255) BEGIN RETURN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(sva,9,2), SUBSTRING(sva,7,2), SUBSTRING(sva,5,2), SUBSTRING(sva,1,4));
key_bug_features: create index on user-defined type using brin
